passive.name: Spiked Shell
passive.description: Rammus gains bonus Attack Damage scaling with his Armor and Magic Resistance.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Rammus}} basic attacks deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} based on his {{as|{{sti|armor}}}}. This effect is increased during ''{{ai|Defensive Ball Curl|Rammus}}''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Rammus' ''' [[basic attack]]s deal {{as|10|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 10% armor)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} {{tip|on-hit}}, increased to {{as|15|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 15% armor)}} during ''{{ai|Defensive Ball Curl|Rammus}}''.

Q.name: Powerball
Q.description: Rammus accelerates in a ball towards his enemies, dealing damage and slowing targets affected by the impact.
Q.tooltip:
Rammus curls into a ball, gaining {{ minimummovespeed }} Move Speed, accelerating up to {{ maximummovespeed }} Move Speed over {{ rollduration }} seconds. Rammus stops after colliding with an enemy, dealing {{ powerballdamage }} magic damage, Knocking Back, and Slowing nearby enemies by {{ slowpercent }}% for {{ slowduration }} second.

Recast: Rammus ends this Ability early.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rammus}} {{tip|channel|channels}} for a few seconds to roll into a ball, gradually gaining {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}. ''Powerball'' can be recast within the duration, and does so automatically afterwards.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Rammus''' stops rolling upon hitting an enemy, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all nearby enemies and {{tip|airborne|knocking them back}}. Enemies hit are then briefly {{tip|stun|stunned}} and {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Rammus''' {{tip|channel|channels}} for up to 6 seconds to roll into a ball, gaining {{sti|ms|{{pp|key=%|150/6 to 235/6|color=ms}} {{as|'''bonus total''' movement speed}}}} per second over the duration, up to a maximum of {{pp|key=%|150 to 235|color=ms}}.

''Powerball'' can be recast after 1 second within the duration, and does so automatically afterwards or when {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Rammus''' stops rolling upon colliding with an enemy, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all nearby enemies and {{tip|airborne|knocking them back}} 125 units, though not through terrain. Enemies hit are then {{tip|stun|stunned}} and {{tip|standard sight|revealed}} for {{tt|{{fd|0.4}}|Estimated}} seconds, as well as {{tip|slow|slowed}} for 1 second.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The initial cast and the manual recast count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
** If the ability is not manually recasted, the secondary effect will trigger without being considered as an ability activation.
* The {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} {{tip|stacks multiplicatively}} with other sources of movement speed boosts.
* ''Powerball'' will still collide with enemies if '''Rammus''' is {{tip|ghosted}}.
* For the purpose of moving closer to an enemy when right clicking them, ''Powerball'' also reduces '''Rammus'''' {{stil|attack range|link=range}}{{ft|to 0|by 125}}for the duration.
** Regardless of this, during ''Powerball'' '''Rammus''' will also always attempt to path towards his target's center instead.
* '''Rammus''' will ignore [[unit collision]] for the purpose of pathfinding during ''Powerball''.
** Rammus acts as if he were {{tip|ghosted}} for the duration of ''Powerball''.
* ''Powerball'' is not a [[Channel#Movement Channels|movement channel]], and so will not be {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}} by {{tip|root}} and {{tip|ground}}.
* {{tip|Displacement immunity}} will also resist the application of the {{tip|stun}}.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Rammus''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|channel|attack=false|move=true|cast={{ai|Defensive Ball Curl|Rammus}} interrupts. {{ai|Frenzying Taunt|Rammus}} is disabled. {{ai|Soaring Slam|Rammus}} modifies this ability. This ability recasts to end channel.|items=interrupts,true,,false|spells=true,true,interrupts,interrupts,interrupts}}

W.name: Defensive Ball Curl
W.description: Rammus goes into a defensive formation, vastly increasing his Armor and Magic Resistance, and returning damage to enemies that attack him.
W.tooltip:
Rammus enters a defensive formation for {{ buffduration }} seconds, gaining {{ bonusarmortooltip }} Armor and {{ bonusmrtooltip }} Magic Resist and dealing {{ returndamagecalc }} magic damage to enemies that Attack him.

Recast: Rammus ends this Ability early.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rammus}} enters a defensive stance for a few seconds, gaining {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}} and {{sti|mr|{{as|'''bonus''' magic resist}}}}. During this time, ''{{ais|Spiked Shell|Rammus}}'' damage is increased and also applies to enemies that land a basic attack against '''Rammus'''.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Defensive Ball Curl'' can be recast within the duration, and does so automatically afterward. '''Rammus'''' basic attacks extend ''Defensive Ball Curl's'' duration up to a few seconds.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rammus''' enters a defensive stance for 6 seconds, gaining {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}} and {{sti|mr|{{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}}}}. While active, enemies that use a basic attack {{tip|on-hit}} against '''Rammus''' are dealt {{as|magic damage}} equal to ''{{ais|Spiked Shell|Rammus}}'' '''bonus''' damage.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus Armor|40 {{as|(+ {{ap|35 to 75}}% '''total''' armor)}}}}
{{st|Bonus Magic Resistance|10 {{as|(+ {{ap|30 to 50}}% '''total''' magic resistance)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: '''Rammus' ''' basic attacks extend the remaining duration of ''Defensive Ball Curl'' by {{fd|0.4}} seconds, up to a maximum of 4 additional seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Defensive Ball Curl'' can be recast after 1 second within the duration, and does so automatically upon casting ''{{ai|Powerball|Rammus}}''.
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
*The initial cast counts as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
**Deactivating the ability manually does not.
* ''Defensive Ball Curl'' ends immediately if {{ai|Powerball|Rammus}} is cast.
* ''Defensive Ball Curl'' will return damage from attacks and/or abilities that apply [[on-hit effect]]s ({{ai|Mystic Shot|Ezreal}}) as well as from {{iis|Runaan's Hurricane}} {{nie|Wind's Fury}} (will not return damage from [[turret]]s, {{ai|H-28G Evolution Turret|Heimerdinger}}, or {{ai|Jack in the Box|Shaco}}).
* The resistance scaling will factor from all sources, including ''Defensive Ball Curl's'' flat bonus. This will recalculate over the duration.

E.name: Frenzying Taunt
E.description: Rammus taunts an enemy champion or monster into a reckless assault against him.
E.tooltip: Rammus Taunts an enemy champion or monster for {{ duration }} seconds. Monsters are dealt {{ monsterdamagecalc }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rammus}} briefly {{tip|taunt|taunts}} the target enemy {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|monster}}, and gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for the same duration.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rammus''' {{tip|taunt|taunts}} the target enemy {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|monster}} for a duration and gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for the same duration.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Taunt/Bonus Attack Speed Duration|{{ap|1.2 to 2}} seconds}}
{{st|Bonus Attack Speed|{{ap|20 to 40}}%}}
wiki_detail.description2: The duration of the {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}} continuously refreshes during ''{{ai|Powerball|Rammus}}'', ''{{ai|Defensive Ball Curl|Rammus}}'' and ''{{ai|Soaring Slam|Rammus}}''.
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|notes        = 
* ''Frenzying Taunt'', despite being usable on {{tip|monster|monsters}}, does not force them to attack '''Rammus'''. He does not draw aggro since the ability does not deal damage.
* The bonus attack speed duration is separate from the {{tip|taunt}} duration.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

R.name: Soaring Slam
R.description: Rammus hops into the air and slams down at a target area, dealing magic damage and slowing enemies. If cast while Rammus is in Powerball, Rammus knocks up enemies near the center as well.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rammus}} {{tip|dash|leaps}} to the target location with {{tip|Cc-immunity}}, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and briefly {{tip|slow|slowing}} them. The impact deals increased damage at the epicenter based on how far ''Soaring Slam'' was cast.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Soaring Slam'' gains increased {{sti|range}} based on '''Rammus'''' {{sti|movement speed}}. '''Rammus''' can cast this ability during ''{{ai|Powerball|Rammus}}'', which will additionally {{tip|airborne|knock up}} enemies in the epicenter.
wiki_detail.blurb3:
The impact causes 3 aftershocks to burst from the area over a short time, each dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} nearby enemies.

''Soaring Slam's'' damage affects [[structures]] and is doubled against {{tip|turrets}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|Cc-immunity|nolink=true}}}}: {{tip|Crowd control}} cannot be applied during this time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rammus''' {{tip|dash|leaps}} to the target location with {{tip|Cc-immunity|immunity to crowd control}}. Upon arrival, he creates an impact that deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|slow|slows}} them for {{fd|1.5}} seconds. The impact deals increased damage at the epicenter if ''Soaring Slam'' was cast further than 800 units, capped at 1700 units with 50% increased damage.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|100 to 250}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}}|Center Increased Damage|{{ap|100*1.5 to 250*1.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|60*1.5}}% AP)}}}}
{{st|Slow|{{ap|15 to 20}}%}}
wiki_detail.description2: If ''Soaring Slam'' was cast during ''{{ai|Powerball|Rammus}}'', enemies within the epicenter are also {{tip|airborne|knocked up}} for {{fd|0.75}} seconds and are dealt ''{{ais|Powerball|Rammus}}'' damage. ''{{ai|Powerball|Rammus}}'' will not collide with enemies during the dash, and its channel will be maintained for the dash and end afterwards.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Center Minimum Damage|{{ap|100 to 250}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}} (+ {{ai|Powerball|Rammus|{{ap|80 to 200 5}} {{as|(+ 100% AP)}}}})|Center Maximum Damage|{{ap|100*1.5 to 250*1.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|60*1.5}}% AP)}} (+ {{ai|Powerball|Rammus|{{ap|80 to 200 5}} {{as|(+ 100% AP)}}}})}}
wiki_detail.description3: The impact causes 3 aftershocks to burst from the area over {{fd|3.5}} seconds, each one dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within and applying the initial {{tip|slow}}, which stacks up to 4 times.
wiki_detail.leveling3:
{{st|Magic Damage per Hit|{{ap|20 to 40}} {{as|(+ 10% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|20*3 to 40*3}} {{as|(+ {{ap|10*3}}% AP)}}}}
{{st|Maximum Slow|{{ap|15*4 to 20*4}}%}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''Soaring Slam's'' damage affects [[structures]] and is doubled against {{tip|turrets}}.
wiki_detail.description5: ''Soaring Slam will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.target range: {{tt|800|Minimum cast range}} OR {{tt|{{as|150% movement speed}}|Measures the average of this percentage of movement speed in the last second. Updates every 0.25 seconds.}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|900|Minimum dash speed}} / {{tt|2000|Maximum dash speed}} <!--Dash speed growth is 110%-->
wiki_detail.notes:
* Applies {{tip|area damage}} for the impact and {{tip|persistent area damage}} for the aftershocks.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block the impact (including with {{ai|Powerball|Rammus}}) but not each aftershock.
* '''Rammus''' is required to have had at least {{as|{{fd|461.5}} movement speed}} ''average'' over the last second to be able to cast ''Soaring Slam'' further than its minimum cast range and thereby deal the increased center damage.
** The maximum increased center damage is reachable once  '''Rammus''' has had at least {{as|{{fd|1307.69}} movement speed}} ''average'' for the past second.
* ''Soaring Slam'' will not impact nor generate aftershocks if the dash is interrupted.<!--and always impacts after {{fd|3.5}} seconds if the dash had not already ended before that time. This part might be changed soon-->
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Rammus''' is dashing:
{{ct|attack=false|move=false|cast=false|items=false|consume=true|spells=true,false,false,false,false|interrupts=death}}
_comments: and always impacts after {{fd|3.5}} seconds if the dash had not already ended before that time. This part might be changed soon
